metadata.description: Leadership skills and agents for Cursor

plugins.name: decision-making
plugins.description: Decision-making skills for leaders — stress-testing strategic choices, surfacing blind spots, and structuring high-stakes decisions.

plugins.name: communication
plugins.description: Communication skills for leaders — navigating difficult conversations, delivering feedback, and resolving conflict.

plugins.name: hiring
plugins.description: Hiring skills for leaders — screening candidates, structuring interviews, and making evidence-based hiring decisions.

plugins.name: performance-management
plugins.description: Performance management skills for leaders — writing fact-based reviews, preparing for calibration, assessing career growth, and helping ICs write compelling self-reviews.
